text: Burnout
To unwind
To recharge
Downtime
Overwhelmed
To set boundaries
To slow down
Self-care
Resilience
To bounce back
Sustainable habits
Work-life balance
To keep up with
I should have set boundaries much sooner.
You had better slow down before you burn out.
For years I saw self-care as selfish.
Small, sustainable habits beat one dramatic change.
It took months, but she bounced back stronger.
I exhausted myself trying to keep up with everyone.
I now treat my downtime as seriously as my work.
Resilience is recovering well, not avoiding stress.
Small sustainable habits keep me balanced.
You had better slow down and recharge.
I treat self-care as essential, not selfish.
I bounce back from stress much faster now.

First, she admits she pushed herself too hard and ignored the signs of burnout. Then her doctor warned her that she had better slow down. After that, she started to set boundaries and protect her downtime. She built small, sustainable habits and stopped seeing self-care as selfish. Finally, she says she now bounces back from stress far more quickly.
